allow: PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="PerformaLayanan-Backend-5000" 2>&1)
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="PerformaLayanan-Frontend-3000" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3000 2>&1)

PowerShell($results = @\(\); foreach \($port in @\(3000, 3001, 5000\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$port" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $results += "Port $port : $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { $results += "Port $port : $\($_.Exception.Message -replace '\\n',' '\)" } }; $results)

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "F:\\EDP\\ssl" | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/FiloSottile/mkcert/releases/download/v1.4.4/mkcert-v1.4.4-windows-amd64.exe" -OutFile "F:\\EDP\\ssl\\mkcert.exe" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Downloaded: $\(\(Get-Item 'F:\\EDP\\ssl\\mkcert.exe'\).Length\) bytes")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $results = @\(\); foreach \($port in @\(3000, 3001, 5000\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost:$port" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $results += "Port $port : $\($r.StatusCode\) OK \(HTTPS\)" } catch { $results += "Port $port : FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message -replace '\\n',' '\)" } }; $results)

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process nginx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "Nginx sudah jalan \(PID: $\($proc.Id\)\) — reload config"; cd "C:\\nginx-1.28.2"; .\\nginx.exe -s reload 2>&1 } else { Write-Host "Nginx belum jalan — start"; cd "C:\\nginx-1.28.2"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\nginx.exe" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $p = Get-Process nginx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Host "Nginx started \(PID: $\($p.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Nginx gagal start" } })

PowerShell(taskkill /F /IM nginx.exe 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd "C:\\nginx-1.28.2"; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\nginx-1.28.2\\nginx.exe" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\nginx-1.28.2" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $p = Get-Process nginx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Host "Nginx started OK \(PID: $\($p.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Nginx gagal start — cek logs" })
